overall.description: A cinematic third-person perspective walking along a hazy wooden harbor dock in a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2). The scene features period-appropriate wooden architecture, a moored sailboat, scattered pedestrians in period clothing, and a warm sepia-toned atmosphere suggesting early morning fog over the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with moored sailboat

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the moored sailboat

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked on the dockside

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock surface
tall wooden mast of a moored sailboat
period horse-drawn carriage waiting on the dock
wooden railings along the edge of the pier
calm water of the harbor with morning mist
silhouetted buildings along the distant waterfront

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a hazy wooden harbor dock with the camera walking forward. A sailboat mast is visible on the left, while a horse-drawn carriage sits parked on the right. The dock is sparsely populated with pedestrians, and the warm morning light creates a sepia atmosphere over the calm harbor water.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing alongside moored sailboat with overhead rigging

events.description: sailboat mast and rigging begin to obscure the left side of the view
camera passes closest point to sailboat mast, rigging dominates foreground

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the sailboat mast and rigging loom overhead and to the left

entered.detail: rope rigging and lines from the sailboat mast

segments.scene_description: The camera moves alongside the moored sailboat, passing under and around its mast and rigging. The wooden pier railings and horse-drawn carriage fall behind as the rigging temporarily dominates the view, creating a semi-enclosed feeling. The dock continues ahead with the harbor water visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock beyond the sailboat obstruction

events.description: clearing the sailboat obstruction, view opens to the harbor ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the sailboat with the harbor opening up ahead, continuing along the dock

segments.scene_description: Having passed the sailboat, the view opens up again to the wide harbor. The wooden dock planks continue forward with the calm water on the left and distant buildings visible through the morning haze. The camera maintains a steady walking pace along the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a hazy harbor dock that shifts from an open waterfront to a momentarily enclosed space before expanding back into a wide vista. It begins by walking past a parked horse-drawn carriage and a distant sailboat mast under a warm, sepia-toned morning light. As the camera advances, the view narrows while passing directly under the sailboat's rigging and masts, momentarily obscuring the horizon. The scene then opens up again as the camera clears the vessel, revealing the expansive wooden planks of the pier and the calm harbor water. Finally, the perspective maintains a steady pace along the waterfront, moving toward distant buildings shrouded in the lingering morning haze.
